## Is Your Feature Related to a Problem?

<!-- A clear and concise description of what the problem is. -->

## Describe the Solution You'd Like

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. -->

## Describe Alternatives You've Considered

<!-- A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered. -->

## Use Case & Benefits

<!-- Why is this feature important? How would it benefit you or the PaySentinel community? -->

## Example Implementation

<!-- If applicable, describe how this feature might work or an example of its usage. -->

```
Code, configuration, or workflow example
```

## Additional Context

<!-- Add any other context, references, or resources about the feature request. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I've checked for existing feature requests
- [ ] This feature aligns with PaySentinel's goals (payment monitoring & alerts)
- [ ] This is not a bug report (use Bug Report if it is)
